Meta.Title: Derustify - Pro-Grade Offline AI Photo Restoration
Meta.Description: Restore your precious memories with Derustify. 100% offline AI photo restoration. One-time purchase. No cloud, no subscriptions, just privacy.

Hero.Badge: · Subscription free   · Works offline   · No registration   · Just Yours
Hero.Title: Private photo restoration
Hero.Description: Stop paying tech giants just to see your own photos. Derustify is a professional-grade restorer that runs 100% on your hardware. Use the app for free, or buy once for unlimited, private processing.

Riverfront.AltBefore: Original black and white photo of New York Riverfront

Header.Title: Built for your memories, not for your data.
Header.Subtitle: Most apps rent you your own photos. We give you the tools to own them.

Denoising.Title: High-Fidelity Denoising
Denoising.Description: Remove decades of digital 'rust' and film grain while preserving fine details. Our adaptive AI ensures a clean, natural look without the 'waxed' effect.

Colorization.Title: Lifelike Colorization
Colorization.Description: Breathe life into black-and-white family history. Our AI understands your photos and adds colors that look real, not artificial.

ScratchRemoval.Title: Heal Scratches & Tears
ScratchRemoval.Description: Erase folds, creases, and physical damage from scanned photos. Our inpainting engine restores missing areas while intelligently cloning the original film grain.

FaceRestoration.Title: Ultra-Sharp Face Restore
FaceRestoration.Description: Advanced detection and enhancement bring back clarity to faces that are blurry, faded, or low-resolution, restoring lost expressions with professional precision.

PhotoScanner.Title: Smart Perspective Scanner
PhotoScanner.Description: Turn your phone into a high-end flatbed scanner. Detect photo edges automatically and correct lens distortion for perfect, digital-first archival.

Batch.Title: Revive Entire Albums
Batch.Description: Don't do it one-by-one. Drop in a folder of photos and let the app work. Uncapped local processing for all your archives.

Privacy.Title: Absolute Privacy
Privacy.Description: Your family photos never leave your device. We don't have servers. We don't have accounts. Your moments stay exactly where they belong: with you.

Performance.Title: Hardware Accelerated
Performance.Description: Built with high-performance, optimized AI that runs directly on your local hardware. No long cloud uploads or processing queues—it works perfectly even on normal, everyday devices.

PrecisionTools.Title: Professional Control
PrecisionTools.Description: Take full control with 'Spectral Weaver' wavelet tools. Manually adjust structural clarity, detail recovery, and film grain for a custom, professional finish.

Header.Title: The honest truth
Header.Subtitle: Everything you need to know about how we're different from the giants.

Q1.A: Because you shouldn't have to 'rent' software to look at your own photos. Modern app companies rely on subscriptions to cover their expensive cloud servers. Since Derustify runs entirely locally on your device, we don't have those server costs to pass on to you. You buy it once, and you own it forever. Period.

Q2.A: Yes. 100%. We physically cannot see your photos, and we don't even require an account. All the AI magic happens directly inside your device's memory. No internet connection is ever required to restore your images, meaning your family history stays exactly where it belongs: with you.

Q3.Q: What's the catch with the Free version?
Q3.A: The free version uses the exact same powerful AI models as the Pro version to process your images—with no watermarks ever. To keep the project sustainable, we limit the free tier to standard HD (1080p) exports and process photos one-by-one. Upgrading to Pro unlocks massive full-resolution 4K exports, opens up our manual pro tools, and lets you batch-process entire albums at once.

Q4.Q: Don't I need a powerful device to run AI?
Q4.A: Not at all! Derustify is highly optimized to run perfectly fine on everyday phones and normal laptops. Because the AI is bundled directly into the app, your device does the processing itself. The only thing affected by your device's performance is speed: a brand-new phone might restore a photo in 10 seconds, while an older device might take a minute. However, very old devices may not be able to run the AI models at all. We recommend at least 4GB of RAM for a smooth experience.

Q5.Q: What kind of editing tools do I get?
Q5.A: Think of Derustify as a streamlined, lightweight version of professional photo editing software. The AI automatically does the heavy lifting for you—removing noise, colorizing, and healing scratches. If you want more control, upgrading to Pro unlocks our 'Spectral Weaver' tools, giving you sliders to manually adjust fine details, film grain, and image structure, plus a retouching brush for the ultimate custom finish.

Q6.A: Not always. The AI doesn't definitively know what color your grandfather's specific tie was in 1945. Instead, it makes a highly educated guess based on training from millions of photos, ensuring things like skin tones, skies, and foliage look incredibly realistic and natural. While it often is correct, some historical inaccuracies in clothing or car colors can occur!

Q7.Q: My result wasn't what I expected. What can I do?
Q7.A: AI is incredibly powerful, but some severely damaged photos need a little extra help! If a photo doesn't look quite right, try turning off certain features and running the steps individually, or try processing the image a second time for extra clarity. If you really want that perfect finish, Derustify+ (Pro) unlocks manual retouching and cloning tools so you can personally clean up stubborn scratches and fine-tune the final result.

Q8.Q: What is the difference between Windows and Mobile?
Q8.A: Both the mobile and Windows apps are tailored for their respective platforms, offering professional-grade AI restoration. Both versions offer a free tier to get you started, with a one-time Derustify+ (Pro) unlock available for those who want maximum quality and control. The Windows version utilizes your PC's hardware to run even larger AI models, supporting massive batch processing and stunningly high resolution exports.
